mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, name, phone, role, account_status, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by, restored_at, restored_by, fcm_token, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT user_id, email, password, name, phone, role, account_status, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by, restored_at, restored_by, fcm_token, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM `user` WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, name, phone, role, account_status, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by, restored_at, restored_by, fcm_token, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM `user` WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND account_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY user_id DESC
SELECT audit_id, target_user_id, actor_user_id, action, before_data, after_data, created_at FROM user_audit_log ORDER BY audit_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` ( email, password, name, phone, role, account_status, created_by ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{accountStatus}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET email = #{email}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE `user` SET password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE `user` SET fcm_token = #{fcmToken}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE password_reset_token SET expires_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND used_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO password_reset_token ( user_id, token_hash, expires_at, request_ip, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{requestIp}, #{userAgent} )
mapper.select: SELECT token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, used_at, created_at, request_ip, user_agent FROM password_reset_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE password_reset_token SET used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE token_id = #{tokenId} AND used_at IS NULL

UPDATE `user` SET account_status = 'DELETED', deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE `user` SET account_status = 'ACTIVE', deleted_at = NULL, restored_by = #{restoredBy}, restored_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND account_status = 'DELETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_audit_log ( target_user_id, actor_user_id, action, before_data, after_data ) VALUES ( #{targetUserId}, #{actorUserId}, #{action}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData} )
INSERT INTO `user` ( email, password, name, phone, role, account_status ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{accountStatus} )
